title: Dekton 10pc Foam Brush Set - Smooth Finish| No Brush Marks| Use On All Surfaces| Low Density Foam Suitable for Paints, Stains, Varnishes Water Based Glues| Easy to Use and Easy to Clean| 10 Piece Set
features: Achieve a Smooth, Flawless Finish: The Dekton 10pc Foam Brush Set is designed to deliver a smooth, even application with no brush marks, ensuring professional-quality results for all your painting and finishing projects. The fine foam bristles glide effortlessly across surfaces, leaving a sleek and polished finish every time.

Versatile Use on All Surfaces: These foam brushes are suitable for use on a wide range of surfaces including wood, metal, plastic, and more. Whether you're applying paint, stains, varnishes, or water-based glues, the Dekton Foam Brush Set is versatile enough to handle various materials and projects with ease.

Low-Density Foam for Optimal Application: The low-density foam used in these brushes is specially designed to work well with paints, stains, and varnishes. It provides excellent control and minimizes absorption, allowing for a more even distribution of your application materials and reducing the need for touch-ups.

Ideal for Various Finishing Projects: Perfect for both DIY enthusiasts and professional painters, this set includes a variety of brush sizes to accommodate different types of projects. Whether you’re working on detailed trim work or large surface areas, the Dekton Foam Brush Set offers flexibility and precision to meet your needs.

Value Pack of 10: Each set includes 10 foam brushes, providing excellent value and convenience. Having multiple brushes on hand ensures that you can work on multiple projects simultaneously or have spare brushes ready for future use. The lightweight and ergonomic design of these brushes make them easy to handle and maneuver, providing comfort during extended use.
description: From the manufacturer 10PC MULTI-SURFACE FOAM BRUSH SET Ideal for varnishing or staining wooden tables, chairs and floors. Set includes: 5 x1 ” (25mm), 3 x 2” (50mm), 1 x 3” (76mm), 1 x 4” (102mm). Easy to use and clean. Low density foam. Multi-surface. No brush marks. Smooth finish. PERFECT FINISH EVERYTIME MULTI-SURFACE Multiple applications: Suitable for use with paints, varnishes, crafts, acrylics, stains and more. NO BRUSH MARKS Foam paint brush set: the package includes 10 lightweight and durable foam paint brushes, which have water-absorbing foam; the foam brush can absorb and spread evenly and reduce dripping. SMOOTH FINISH The tip of the foam brush is bevelled, which allows the brush to enter narrow areas making them easy to use. PERFECT FINISH EVRYTIME Foam paint brush set: the package includes 10 lightweight and durable foam paint brushes, which have water-absorbing foam; the foam brush can absorb and spread evenly and reduce dripping. The tip of the foam brush is bevelled, which allows the brush to enter narrow areas making them easy to use. Reusable foam brush: the foam brush is washable and reusable.. High quality craft: Made of high density foam, they are durable and comfortable to hold, the absorbent brush can reduce dripping; a great selection for painting hobbies and professional needs. Multiple applications: Suitable for use with paints, varnishes, crafts, acrylics, stains and more.
